name: ReCoLoRA: Spectrum-Aware Recursive Consolidation for Continual LLM Fine-Tuning

four_principles_filter.去粗取精: 研讨厅按 intake_score≥0.6 + 子系统匹配入库
four_principles_filter.去伪存真: 代码级落地/规划态已在决策中标注
four_principles_filter.由表及里: 研讨厅驱动正式入库固化

digest_notes: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning adapts a large language model to one task cheaply, but across a task sequence LoRA-style methods keep stacking low-rank updates, so each new task tends to overwrite previous ones. We present ReCoLoRA, a spectrum-aware framework for continual fine-tuning: adapters are initialized from randomized SVD of pretrained weight, per-layer effective ranks selected by elbow criterion. On six-task GLUE sequence over four 7-8B backbones, ReCoLoRA attains best final average sco
